extraction.one_line_summary: DEMAR Arnaud took his third stage win in a tactical sprint as the peloton misjudged the breakaway catch, closing only 20 seconds with 2km remaining.
tactical_patterns: Peloton miscalculated chase badly: gap still 3 minutes at 25km, causing panic and requiring multiple teams to intervene late.
Wind created key split 30km out eliminating Richie Porte's group, showing positioning failures despite flat terrain to finish.
Breakaway doubled their gap on Nava climb to 7 minutes, revealing peloton fatigue allowed sprint teams to lose control mid-stage.

rider_signals.BALDY Roman: negative: forced to abandon from 4th GC overnight due to illness despite looking brilliant through 12 stages
rider_signals.DEMAR Arnaud: positive: third stage win showing dominant sprint form plus controlling intermediate sprints to extend ciclamino lead unopposed
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: caught in 30-rider split 30km out in crosswinds despite relatively straightforward sprint stage finale
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: close second but couldn't come around Demar despite Quickstep working all day for the leadout
